title: pilea triplinervis
intro: Pilea triplinervis, also known as the Althernan or Fan-leaved Pilea, is a species of plant in the Urticaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Pilea triplinervis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Pilea triplinervis is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
